items.prompt: In a typical UVM stack, the environment (env) mainly…
choices: Replaces the DUT inside the RTL netlist
Holds agents, scoreboard, and other TB structure
Is the same thing as the virtual interface only
Runs only in the browser lab, never offline
items.explain: The env is the container for agents and checking components.

items.prompt: The stimulus path for driving the DUT is best described as…
choices: sequence → sequencer → driver → virtual interface → DUT
items.explain: Sequences flow through the sequencer and driver to the interface pins.

items.prompt: A passive agent differs from an active agent because it…
choices: Observes without a driver/sequencer stimulus path
Cannot connect to a virtual interface
items.explain: Passive agents monitor only; active agents include driver (and sequencer).

items.prompt: The browser tb-layers lab runs Accellera UVM inside your tab.
items.explain: Track B is a concept sketch; real UVM runs offline with a simulator.
